title: Privacy / consent / deletion plan
decisions: Normal recording/evaluation consent and Brush-up material consent must be separate.
Brush-up consent must be explicit, script-scoped, and tied to the selected best take.
Voice sample, consent recording, and best take audio must go to providers only through server-side routes.
Account deletion must cover provider cleanup, Storage cleanup, DB cleanup/anonymize, Supabase Auth deletion, and completion tracking.
Store submission remains blocked until actual account/data deletion is proven with a disposable live proof.

dataCategories.name: account_auth
dataCategories.accountDeletion: Delete Auth last after provider, Storage, and DB cleanup; retain only safe anonymized deletion tracking if policy allows.

dataCategories.name: scripts
processors: OpenAI when script generation is enabled
dataCategories.accountDeletion: Delete user-owned scripts after dependent rows and Storage artifacts are cleaned.

dataCategories.name: recordings_takes_transcripts_scores
dataCategories.accountDeletion: Delete audio objects, take rows, transcripts, score rows, weak words, and coaching feedback.
dataCategories.revoke: Original take/review remains unless account deletion or future granular take deletion applies.

dataCategories.name: generated_model_audio
dataCategories.accountDeletion: Delete Storage objects, DB rows, saved pins, and provider-side artifacts if applicable.
dataCategories.revoke: If generated from revoked Brush-up material, delete or hide the generated audio.

dataCategories.name: voice_setup_material
dataCategories.accountDeletion: Delete samples, consent recordings, local voice rows, and provider-side cloned voices.
dataCategories.revoke: Stop future use, delete or disable provider cloned voice, and remove consent-linked app-owned material if separate revoke is offered.

dataCategories.name: brush_up_material_and_variants
processors: ElevenLabs or approved provider through server-side route
dataCategories.accountDeletion: Delete future Brush-up consents, copied source material, provider-side variants, generated audio, and saved pins.
dataCategories.revoke: Stop future use, delete or disable provider-side script-scoped variant, delete copied source material, and delete or hide generated Brush-up audio.

dataCategories.name: quota_processing_metadata
dataCategories.accountDeletion: Delete by v1 default unless a disclosed anonymized short retention policy is approved.
dataCategories.revoke: Usually not separately revoked unless linked to deleted or revoked artifacts by policy.

brushUpConsentRequirements: Identify the script and selected take.
State that the selected best take is used as voice material, not only as a practice recording.
Confirm server-side provider transfer through Native Minute, not direct client upload to provider.
Limit generated voice/audio to the script.
Explain revoke and account deletion coverage.
v1PreSubmitBlockers: Final Privacy Policy / Terms / support copy review
Public privacy URL, support URL, and account deletion URL
Disposable live proof for provider, Storage, DB, Auth, and completion
Brush-up consent/revoke/delete/provider cleanup proof if Brush-up ships in v1
App Privacy and Google Data Safety answers aligned with final behavior
Provider cost guard, monitoring, and incident/support readiness

gate3: Cost guard, monitoring, kill switch, and safe failure recovery
gate3_5: Future data model and API candidates
Consent to provider to app-owned replay to revoke/delete proof
